title: 工具执行成功: read_file

 526 |     @staticmethod
 527 |     def _normalize_path(path: Optional[str]) -> str:
 528 |         return (path or "").replace("\\", "/").lower().strip()
 529 | 
 530 |     def retrieve_by_file_path(
 531 |         self,
 532 |         file_path: str,
 533 |         top_k: int = 5
 534 |     ) -> List[Tuple[SessionSummary, float, str]]:
 535 |         """
 536 |         根据文件路径检索相关摘要
 537 | 
 538 |         Args:
 539 |             file_path: 文件路径
 540 |             top_k: 返回结果数量
 541 | 
 542 |         Returns:
 543 |             元组列表：(摘要, 相关性分数, 来源层)
 544 |         """
 545 |         results = []
 546 | 
 547 |         # 1. 检索情景记忆
 548 |         for summary in self.episodic_memory.get_all():
 549 |             for fc in summary.files_changed:
 550 |                 if file_path in fc.path:
 551 |                     score = 1.0 if fc.path == file_path else 0.5
 552 |                     results.append((summary, score, "episodic"))
 553 |                     break
 554 | 
 555 |         # 2. 检索长期记忆
 556 |         if len(results) < top_k:
 557 |             # 使用文件名作为关键词搜索
 558 |             filename = file_path.split("/")[-1].split("\\")[-1]
 559 |             long_term_results = self._search_long_term_memory(filename, top_k - len(results))
 560 |             results.extend(long_term_results)
 561 | 
 562 |         # 去重并排序
 563 |         seen_ids = set()
 564 |         unique_results = []
 565 |         for summary, score, source in results:
 566 |             if summary.session_id not in seen_ids:
 567 |                 seen_ids.add(summary.session_id)
 568 |                 unique_results.append((summary, score, source))
 569 | 
 570 |         unique_results.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
 571 | 
 572 |         return unique_results[:top_k]
 573 | 
 574 |     def retrieve_by_error_type(
 575 |         self,
 576 |         error_type: str,
 577 |         top_k: int = 5
 578 |     ) -> List[Tuple[SessionSummary, float, str]]:
 579 |         """
 580 |         根据错误类型检索相关摘要

 582 |         Args:

 585 | 
 586 |         Returns:

 588 |         """
 589 |         results = []
 590 | 
 591 |         # 检索情景记忆
 592 |         for summary in self.episodic_memory.get_all():
 593 |             for error in summary.errors_encountered:
 594 |                 if error_type.lower() in error.error_type.lower():
 595 |                     score = 1.0 if error.error_type == error_type else 0.7
 596 |                     results.append((summary, score, "episodic"))
 597 |                     break
 598 | 
 599 |         # 检索长期记忆
 600 |         if len(results) < top_k:
 601 |             long_term_results = self._search_long_term_memory(error_type, top_k - len(results))
 602 |             results.extend(long_term_results)
 603 | 
 604 |         # 去重并排序
 605 |         seen_ids = set()
 606 |         unique_results = []
 607 |         for summary, score, source in results:
 608 |             if summary.session_id not in seen_ids:
 609 |                 seen_ids.add(summary.session_id)
 610 |                 unique_results.append((summary, score, source))
 611 | 
 612 |         unique_results.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
 613 | 
 614 |         return unique_results[:top_k]
 615 |

 619 |

 622 |         """

 624 |             "working_memory_size": len(self.working_memory),
 625 |             "episodic_memory_size": len(self.episodic_memory),
 626 |             "long_term_memory_c...
